import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-18079362525503296285']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    valid_tables = json.load(f)

batch = valid_tables[:100]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(34) # double quote
s_quote = chr(39) # single quote

for sym in batch:
    # SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, MAX("Adj Close") as MaxPrice FROM "SYM" WHERE Date BETWEEN '2015-01-01' AND '2015-12-31' HAVING MaxPrice > 200
    q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-18079362525503296285']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    valid_tables = json.load(f)

batch = valid_tables[:50]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(34)
s_quote = chr(39)

    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-18079362525503296285']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    valid_tables = json.load(f)

batch = valid_tables[0:50]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(34)
s_quote = chr(39)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

val_args.code:
import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-18079362525503296285']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    valid_tables = json.load(f)

batch = valid_tables[0:50]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(34)
s_quote = chr(39)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-3732249194138612113']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

keywords = ["Ultra", "3x", "2x", "Daily", "Bull", "Bear", "Leverage", "ProShares", "Direxion", "VelocityShares"]
candidates = []
for entry in data:
    desc = entry.get("Company Description", "")
    if desc and any(k in desc for k in keywords):
        candidates.append(entry["Symbol"])

# Also add known high priced ones if not included
extra = ["SPY", "IVV", "VOO", "DIA", "QQQ", "GLD"]
for e in extra:
    if e not in candidates and any(d['Symbol'] == e for d in data):
        candidates.append(e)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(candidates))

val_args.code:
import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-3732249194138612113']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

keywords = ["Ultra", "3x", "2x", "Daily", "Bull", "Bear", "Leverage", "ProShares", "Direxion", "VelocityShares"]
candidates = []
for entry in data:
    desc = entry.get("Company Description", "")
    if desc and any(k in desc for k in keywords):
        candidates.append(entry["Symbol"])

# Also add known high priced ones if not included
extra = ["SPY", "IVV", "VOO", "DIA", "QQQ", "GLD"]
for e in extra:
    if e not in candidates and any(d['Symbol'] == e for d in data):
        candidates.append(e)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(candidates))

import json

# Candidates from previous step
candidates = ["AGQ", "AWTM", "BDCY", "BOIL", "BRZU", "BZQ", "CHAD", "CHAU", "CLIX", "COM", "CURE", "CWEB", "DDG", "DDM", "DFEN", "DIG", "DLBR", "DOG", "DPST", "DRIP", "DRN", "DRV", "DUG", "DUSL", "DUST", "DWT", "DXD", "DZK", "EDC", "EDZ", "EET", "EEV", "EFO", "EFU", "EFZ", "EMTY", "EPV", "ERX", "ERY", "ESNG", "EUM", "EUO", "EURL", "EWV", "EZJ", "FAS", "FAZ", "FLYT", "FUMB", "FXP", "GLL", "GSY", "GUSH", "HDG", "HDGE", "HDLB", "HIBL", "HIBS", "INDL", "JDST", "JNUG", "JPNL", "KNOW", "KOLD", "KORU", "LABD", "LABU", "LACK", "LBJ", "LMLB", "LTL", "MEXX", "MIDU", "MJO", "MUTE", "MVV", "MYY", "MZZ", "NAIL", "NEED", "NUGT", "ONLN", "OPER", "PASS", "PILL", "PSQ", "PST", "PULS", "QID", "QLD", "QMJ", "QQQE", "RALS", "RDIV", "REK", "RETL", "REW", "RINF", "ROM", "RUSL", "RWCD", "RWDC", "RWDE", "RWED", "RWGV", "RWIU", "RWLS", "RWM", "RWSL", "RWUI", "RWVG", "RXD", "RXL", "SAA", "SBB", "SCC", "SCO", "SDD", "SDOW", "SDP", "SDS", "SEF", "SH", "SIJ", "SJB", "SKF", "SMDD", "SMLL", "SMN", "SOXL", "SOXS", "SPDN", "SPUU", "SPXB", "SPXE", "SPXL", "SPXN", "SPXS", "SPXT", "SPXU", "SPXV", "SRS", "SRTY", "SSG", "SSO", "SVXY", "SZK", "TAWK", "TBF", "TBT", "TBX", "TECL", "TECS", "TMF", "TMV", "TNA", "TOLZ", "TPOR", "TTT", "TWM", "TYBS", "TYD", "TYO", "TZA", "UBOT", "UBR", "UBT", "UCC", "UCO", "UDN", "UDOW", "UGE", "UGL", "UJB", "ULBR", "ULE", "ULST", "ULTR", "UMDD", "UPRO", "UPV", "UPW", "URE", "URTY", "USD", "USDU", "USI", "UST", "UTSL", "UUP", "UVXY", "UWM", "UWT", "UXI", "UYG", "UYM", "VALT", "VIXM", "VIXY", "WANT", "WBIE", "WBIF", "WBIG", "WBII", "WBIL", "WBIN", "WBIT", "WEBL", "WEBS", "WIZ", "XCOM", "XPP", "YANG", "YCL", "YCOM", "YCS", "YINN", "YXI", "ZMLP", "ZSL", "SPY", "IVV", "VOO", "DIA", "GLD"]

batch = candidates[0:70]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(34)
s_quote = chr(39)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

queries = []

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    candidates = json.load(f)

# Batches of 20
batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(0, 60, batch_size): # 0, 20, 40
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

filename = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']
with open(filename, 'r') as f:
    candidates = json.load(f)

# Batches of 20
batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(0, 60, batch_size): # 0, 20, 40
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

args.code:
import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

# Batches of 20
batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(0, 60, batch_size): # 0, 20, 40
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

val_args.code:
import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

# Batches of 20
batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(0, 60, batch_size): # 0, 20, 40
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(60, 120, batch_size): # 60, 80, 100
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(60, 120, batch_size): # 60, 80, 100
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(120, 180, batch_size): # 120, 140, 160
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(120, 180, batch_size): # 120, 140, 160
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(180, 225, batch_size): # 180, 200, 220
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

candidates = locals()['var_function-call-5714173529954912928']

batch_size = 20
batches = []
for i in range(180, 225, batch_size): # 180, 200, 220
    chunk = candidates[i:i+batch_size]
    queries = []
    q_quote = chr(34)
    s_quote = chr(39)
    for sym in chunk:
        q = "SELECT " + s_quote + sym + s_quote + " as Symbol, MAX(" + q_quote + "Adj Close" + q_quote + ") as MaxPrice FROM " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " WHERE Date BETWEEN " + s_quote + "2015-01-01" + s_quote + " AND " + s_quote + "2015-12-31" + s_quote + " HAVING MaxPrice > 200"
        queries.append(q)
    full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
    batches.append(full_query)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(batches))
